name: fabricjs-template-generator
description: GetPosts Pipeline v2 — HTML to Fabric.js para templates HealthMarket / KultivAi.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('\n[ok] playwright instalado. Agora rode: npx playwright install chromium (baixa o binario do navegador, ~150MB).\n')"
scripts.check-playwright: node -e "const { chromium } = require('playwright'); chromium.launch().then(b => b.close()).then(() => console.log('playwright OK')).catch(e => { console.error('FAIL:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
